Package neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi

Enum Class DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType>
neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi.DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType>, Constable
Enclosing class:
DexpiServiceClassifier
static enum DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType extends Enum<DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType>
P&ID service categories with their associated drawing style.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    DRAIN
    Open / closed drain and sewer (light, dotted).
    FLARE
    Flare / vent / relief headers (medium, dash-dot, red).
    FUEL_GAS
    Fuel gas (medium, dashed, orange).
    MAIN_PROCESS
    Primary process flow (largest weight, solid).
    SECONDARY_PROCESS
    Secondary process flow (medium weight, solid).
    UTILITY
    Steam / cooling water / instrument air / nitrogen (light, dashed).

  • Enum Constant Details

    • MAIN_PROCESS

      public static final DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType MAIN_PROCESS
      Primary process flow (largest weight, solid).

    • SECONDARY_PROCESS

      public static final DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType SECONDARY_PROCESS
      Secondary process flow (medium weight, solid).

    • UTILITY

      public static final DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType UTILITY
      Steam / cooling water / instrument air / nitrogen (light, dashed).

    • FLARE

      public static final DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType FLARE
      Flare / vent / relief headers (medium, dash-dot, red).

    • DRAIN

      public static final DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType DRAIN
      Open / closed drain and sewer (light, dotted).

    • FUEL_GAS

      public static final DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType FUEL_GAS
      Fuel gas (medium, dashed, orange).

  • Constructor Details

    • ServiceType

      private ServiceType(double lineWeight, int lineType, String colorR, String colorG, String colorB)
      Creates a service type.
      Parameters:
      lineWeight - ISO 15519-1 line weight in mm
      lineType - DEXPI line type code
      colorR - presentation red component (0-1)
      colorG - presentation green component (0-1)
      colorB - presentation blue component (0-1)

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getLineWeight

      double getLineWeight()
      Returns the ISO 15519-1 line weight for this service.
      Returns:
      line weight in mm

    • getLineType

      int getLineType()
      Returns the DEXPI line-type code for this service.
      Returns:
      0 solid, 1 dashed, 2 dotted, 3 dash-dot

    • getColorR

      String getColorR()
      Returns the presentation red component.
      Returns:
      red component (0-1) as a string

    • getColorG

      String getColorG()
      Returns the presentation green component.
      Returns:
      green component (0-1) as a string

    • getColorB

      String getColorB()
      Returns the presentation blue component.
      Returns:
      blue component (0-1) as a string

    • getFluidCode

      String getFluidCode()
      Returns the NORSOK Z-003 / PIP fluid (service) code for this service category.

      The codes follow common process-industry usage: PG process gas/general process, FL flare/relief, DR drains, FG fuel gas, UT utility and PL secondary process liquid. The code is used when composing a full line-identification number.

      Returns:
      the two-letter fluid code (never null)
